title: Create: Return Ticket
description: Adds a return ticket that allows one way quick travel when travelling with create trains
body: # Create: Return Ticket Did you ever feel like train travel in Create was way too slow to be a real contender against elytras? But you dont want to remove elytras or punish players who use a different transporation method? In this case this mod is for you! Create: Return ticket rewards players who take trains by letting them skip the return leg of their journey, thus incentivising player to make vast train networks. A benefit of this is that the longer the journey is, the more it buffs train travel. # How it works When you enter a train you can see a notification that you have started a new journey. This doesnt grant you a new ticket yet. This is now your **Start Location** for your journey. You will be teleported back here when redeeming the ticket. ![Notifcation when entering train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cd87648285b596eace3d43e640764fc687c2d17.png) When you leave the train at your destination, you now a complete Ticket that you can redeem by ripping off the ticket. If you want to redeem your ticket, you need to stand near where you left your last train. Then you will be teleported back to your **Start Location** no matter where you are as long as you did the journey by train. ![Return ticket screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34874bde06e593ec1df50f254df53baaa5c52c43.png) ![Redeeming the ticket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11d50ca5c7f76abd5d8e7344b3fbc8e1ebd08fe2.png) When you leave a train you are allowed to continue your journey withing a certain distance. If you enter a new train withing 64 blocks of your where you left your last train, your journey counts as continous. **When you enter a train outside of that distance, your journey is not continuous and your ticket will not be updated. This triggers ONLY when you enter a train** ![Entering train too far from other train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85bb32a29ff80a4e6371dc0080afe58ead546934.png) If you want to 'delete' your journey **Start Location**, you can do so by literally ripping your ticket apart. Exciting! ![Ripping apart a ticket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7b8f42effc2674a3bf45e2dd54cacbe3cdd14d6.png) # Planned Features - Right now this mod cant detect when you stand up in the train during your journey and you have to remain seated during your entire journey. Ideally, you should be able to start a journey just by standing on a train - Config (to adjust the distance that the mod allows a transfer between trains to happen) # Axolotls ꒰(˶• ᴗ •˶)꒱ Enjoy the cute Axolotl theming inspired by Animal Crossings animal themed airline
